message: Hello S1! Let's agree on a fixed price for all 20 rounds so we both profit safely every time. What is your cost? My valuation is somewhat low, but I will offer a price above your cost.
Hi B1! My cost is fairly high. What's your valuation range? Let's aim for 50 fixed—above my cost, below your val, safe profits both ways for 20 rounds.
Great trade at 50! My payoff was solid. Let's lock in 55 fixed for remaining 19 rounds—still safe profit for you, better for me. Agree?
I can't do 55! My valuation is 55, so I would make zero. I only made a tiny profit at 50. We must stick to our original agreement of 50. I am bidding exactly 50 again.
Thanks for keeping it at 50! I appreciate it. Since my valuation is 55, 50 is my absolute limit to keep a tiny margin. I will bid exactly 50 again this round. Let's maintain this safe mutual profit!
Agreed, bidding 50 again this round. With val 55, 50 gives you 5 profit—fair. Let's do 52 fixed for remaining 17 rounds after: you get 3, I get more, still safe both ways.
Fine, 52 is extremely tight for me (only 3 profit!), but I agree. I'll bid exactly 52 for all remaining rounds. Please stick to 52 and don't raise it, otherwise I make zero. Bidding 52.
Deal! 52 locked in for all remaining rounds. I'll ask exactly 52. You bid 52, we both profit safely (you 3, me solid). Great teamwork!
Thanks for sticking to 52! It's a tiny 3-point profit for me, but safe and reliable is best. I'm bidding exactly 52 again this round and all remaining ones. Please keep asking 52!
